calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Earnings Withholding Order Of Judgment Debtor'S Spouse
Off Calendar Feb-21-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS AKAY's Motion For Earnings Withholding Order Of Judgment Debtor's Spouse,

Off calendar at the request of the moving party.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Off Calendar

Declaration Iso Default Judgment - Pos Attached And Exhibits
Off Calendar Jun-08-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Douglas N. Akay, Esq., appearing on his own behalf. Mr. Akay was sworn and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Jeffrey B. Abbett, an individual, and Abbett Electric Corporation, a California Corporation.
Default of Defendants has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:
Defendant Abbett Electrical Corporation, to pay the following:
Damages:$9,530.51
Pre-Judgment Interest: 1,242.99
Total: $10,773.50

Defendant Jeffrey B. Abbett, and individual, to pay the following:
Damages: $36,209.16
Pre-Judgment Interest: $38,003.52
Costs: $612.55
Total: 74,825.23

Judgment signed in open court.
